name: billing-ui
title: Parcae · Billing UI
description: All Parcae billing UI in one shot: PricingTable, CheckoutButton, CustomerPortalButton, SubscriptionCard, InvoiceList, PaymentMethodList, UsageMeter, CancelDialog, UpdatePlanDialog, plus hooks (useBilling, useCurrentPlan) and transformers. Visuals forked from billingsdk.com.
author: Parcae <https://github.com/EdenCoder/parcae>
